title: Fix member-selected variable must have randmode

features.name: constraint accessing local rand member property
features.description: Code should include a class with a local rand member of a user-defined class type, where the member's property is accessed in a constraint expression

features.name: local rand member with virtual base class
features.description: Code should include a class with a local rand member whose type extends a virtual class and has rand_mode() override

features.name: constraint accessing member through object hierarchy
features.description: Code should include a constraint that accesses a property of a class member that extends a virtual class, where the member has local rand visibility
